mapper.select:
SELECT c.SALES_PROD_ID, c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, c.COMP_QTY, c.SORT_ORDER, c.USE_YN, c.DEL_YN, c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.MOD_ID, c.MOD_DT,
cp.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, cp.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME, cp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME,
cp.LIST_PRICE, cp.COST_PRICE, cp.VAT_RATE, cp.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, cp.SALE_STATUS_CD, sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME, cp.SALE_START_DT, cp.SALE_END_DT,
sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_TYPE_NAME, storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, process_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS UNIT_TYPE_NAME, cut_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DIVISION_TYPE_NAME FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP c JOIN TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT cp ON c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID = cp.COMPONENT_PROD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON cp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_type ON sale_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_type.CODE_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' AND sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.SALE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_status ON sale_status.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.CODE_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.SALE_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE storage_type ON storage_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND storage_type.CODE_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' AND storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.STORAGE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE process_type ON process_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND process_type.CODE_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' AND process_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.PROCESS_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE unit_type ON unit_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND unit_type.CODE_ID = 'UNIT_TYPE' AND unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.UNIT_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE cut_type ON cut_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND cut_type.CODE_ID = 'CUT_TYPE' AND cut_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = cp.CUT_TYPE_CD WHERE c.SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} AND c.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP ( SALES_PROD_ID, COMPONENT_PROD_ID, COMP_QTY, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{salesProdId}, #{componentProdId}, #{compQty}, #{sortOrder},
#{useYn} 'Y' , 'N', #{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE COMP_QTY = VALUES(COMP_QTY), SORT_ORDER = VALUES(SORT_ORDER), USE_YN = VALUES(USE_YN), DEL_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = VALUES(MOD_ID), MOD_DT = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{salesProdId} AND COMPONENT_PROD_ID = #{componentProdId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
